label: New
items: Weekly Overview page (/weekly) — a Sunday-morning summary of your week ahead. Tasks grouped by type, weather alerts per day, what to sow this week, harvest windows opening, pruning windows opening, maintenance roll-up, pest/disease risk lines tuned to YOUR inventory, a rolling pollen forecast, and 3-5 seasonal tips (with extra AI-grounded tips when the back-end has access to the AI). Generated by a new cron every Sunday at 06:00 UTC; tap Regenerate on the page to rebuild on demand.
Weekly Overview push notification — a single 'Your week ahead' notification lands Sunday morning with a one-line headline and deep-links straight into the new page.

Golden Hour notification — wired up at last. The daily morning batch now also queues a 'Sunset around 7:42pm' golden-hour line per home, computed from your location with NOAA's solar-position formulae. Skipped automatically when sunset is already too close, or when you're inside a polar circle and the sun doesn't set today.

Weekly Optimise Digest notification — wired up too. Sunday at 07:00 UTC, an activity-aware digest (tasks completed, skipped, overdue, blueprints active) drops in with a deep link to the Optimise tab so you can review the week's schedule efficiency in one tap.

Pollen forecast — daily Open-Meteo Air Quality fetch keeps a rolling grass/birch/ragweed peak-per-day cache. The Weekly Overview surfaces it as Mon/Tue/Wed/Thu/Fri/Sat/Sun badges per pollen type. Coverage is best in Europe + North America; outside those regions the section is omitted silently.

label: Improved
items: Pest/disease risk module — the Weekly Overview now includes rule-based risk lines tuned to your plant inventory and the upcoming forecast: late blight for tomatoes/potatoes after warm-and-wet stretches, powdery mildew for cucurbits after sustained heat, aphid surge on roses + broad beans during warm spells, slug pressure on lettuces + hostas after rain, drought stress on containers during dry warm runs. Each line includes a specific action to take.
Notifications tab — Golden hour, Weekly optimise digest, and Weekly garden overview toggles are now all wired and default ON. The 'Coming soon' badge is gone.
